zotero.abstractNote: Adversarial robustness has become a central topic in machine learning, with a large number of defenses proposed in the last few years. However, the field lacks a standardized way to evaluate these defenses, leading to a fragmented landscape where it is difficult to compare different methods. In this paper, we introduce RobustBench, a standardized benchmark for adversarial robustness. RobustBench provides a collection of pre-trained models, a unified evaluation framework, and a leaderboard for different threat models. We hope that RobustBench will facilitate the development of more robust models and provide a clear picture of the state-of-the-art in adversarial robustness.
